Gary R. Bosch, Esq. (415) 975-8600 for Plaintiff and Moving Party for M.M. Diamond & Gems, Inc.
Richard D. Givens, Esq. (650) 365-6144 for Defendant and Opposing Party YND Trading Corporation
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: PLAINTIFF M.M. DIAMONDS & GEMS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED. The case is stayed as to YND Trading Corporation because of the bankruptcy. Liability is joint and general. Summary judgment will be entered against Danziger both as to the complaint and the cross complaint. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
